packet.claim: A generated discovery claim should be routed to human collaborator review only when it exposes decision options, provenance, uncertainty, measurable variables, and a falsification path.
missingness: No real collaborator study has been run yet.
packet.revision_reason: Frontier scientific AI and HCI work increasingly evaluates workflow validity and sensemaking trajectory, not final-answer plausibility alone.
packet.human_decision_needed: Choose whether the claim should advance to collaborator review or remain in automated hypothesis testing.

decision_options.tradeoff: Higher human attention cost but improved auditability before memory promotion.
decision_options.acceptance_criterion: Reviewer can identify what evidence, uncertainty, and next action are being judged.

decision_options.tradeoff: Lower human burden but delayed collaborator feedback.
decision_options.acceptance_criterion: Automated gates can generate a missing variable, provenance step, or falsification route.

measurable_variables.name: reviewer_decision_agreement
measurable_variables.measurement: percent agreement across reviewers on advance versus return decision

measurable_variables.name: unsupported_promotion_rate
measurable_variables.measurement: fraction of claims promoted without provenance, uncertainty, variables, or falsification route

packet.falsification_route: If collaborator agreement and unsupported-promotion rate do not improve versus ungated promotion, the gate fails its purpose and must be revised.

provenance_chain.artifact: public sources on scientific AI validity and sensemaking

packet.uncertainty_summary: The design implication is plausible but not yet validated by an MC-specific collaborator study.
packet.next_executable_action: Run this fixture through the validation CLI and wire the gate before human review queues.

packet.claim: A plausible hypothesis is ready for collaborator review because it sounds promising.
packet.falsification_route: Reject if decision options are absent and reviewers cannot make a bounded choice.
packet.uncertainty_summary: The claim lacks enough structure for meaningful review.
packet.next_executable_action: Add at least two decision options with tradeoffs and acceptance criteria.

packet.claim: A private longitudinal record should be added to discovery review.
packet.revision_reason: Private status must not enter public-safe discovery artifacts.
packet.human_decision_needed: Choose whether private records can be reviewed.

decision_options.tradeoff: Protects privacy but blocks the packet.

measurable_variables.name: privacy_fail_count
measurable_variables.measurement: count of packets with non-public-safe privacy status

measurable_variables.name: deidentification_completion
measurable_variables.measurement: percent of required privacy fields completed

packet.falsification_route: Reject packets whose privacy_status is not explicitly public-safe, deidentified public-safe, or synthetic-only.
packet.uncertainty_summary: No uncertainty should override the privacy boundary.
packet.next_executable_action: Convert the packet into synthetic or deidentified public-safe form before review.
